code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_space = false
    if at_end
      is_space = true
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if is_space
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        let sq = v * v
        if first
          out = "#{sq}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sq}"
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    else
      let ch = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(ch)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
